task_completion.description: Create the required layers with correct colors
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Layer List panel (usually on the right side of LibreCAD). Verify the presence of layers named 'PANEL_OUTLINE' (White/Black depending on theme), 'CUTOUTS' (Cyan), and 'NOTES' (Yellow).

task_completion.description: Draw the 482.6mm x 43.7mm panel outline rectangle
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the main drawing area. Verify a long, thin rectangle is drawn on the 'PANEL_OUTLINE' layer. The command line history or coordinate display should indicate it starts at 0,0 and has dimensions 482.6 x 43.7.
Look at the drawing area. Verify two small circles are present on the 'CUTOUTS' layer (cyan), located near the far left and far right edges of the panel.

task_completion.description: Draw the 40mm x 40mm square fan cutout
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the drawing area. Verify a square is drawn on the 'CUTOUTS' layer (cyan) exactly in the horizontal center of the panel.

task_completion.description: Draw the 20mm diameter power connector circle
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the drawing area. Verify a circle is drawn on the 'CUTOUTS' layer (cyan) positioned between the center square and the right mounting hole.
Look at the drawing area. Verify the text '1U FAN PLATE' is placed on the 'NOTES' layer (yellow) inside the panel, towards the left side.

task_completion.description: Save the file as rack_panel.dxf in the correct directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the LibreCAD window title bar, save dialog, or command line history. Verify the file is named 'rack_panel.dxf' and saved to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/.

integrity.description: Agent used the LibreCAD GUI to create the drawing
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LibreCAD application open with active use of its drawing tools, command line, and layer panels, rather than just a terminal window running a script.
Screenshots should show the progression of the drawing being built step-by-step (e.g., outline first, then cutouts), not just an imported image or a pre-made file being opened.

integrity.description: Agent saved the file using the application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog box in LibreCAD being used, or the command line in LibreCAD confirming the save operation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a standard 19-inch 1U rack panel in LibreCAD. Key verified dimensions: Panel width is 482.6 mm, height is 43.7 mm. Mounting holes are 6.0 mm in diameter with a spacing of 465.1 mm. The power connector is 20.0 mm in diameter. The file must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/rack_panel.dxf.
